TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-weaving_Kagaw
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: kagaw ku kagaw nawkeh ku ralu'mu ga.
S.PHON: kaɣaw ku kaɣaw nawkeħ ku raluʔmu ɣa.
S.FORM: kagaw ku kagaw nawkeh ku ralu'mu ga.
S.PHON: kaɣaw ku kaɣaw nawkeħ ku raluʔmu ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Kagaw Nawkeh.
My name is Kagaw Nawkeh.

S.FORM: ru yava'mu ga yukeh naupas.
S.PHON: ru ja*aʔmu ɣa jukeħ naupas~ɕ.
S.FORM: ru yava'mu ga yukeh naupas.
S.PHON: ru ja*aʔmu ɣa jukeħ naupas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 然後我爸爸的名字是Yukeh Naupas.
And my father is Yukeh Naupas.

S.FORM: i yaya'mu ga laway naupas.
S.PHON: i jajaʔmu ɣa lawaj naupas~ɕ.
S.FORM: i yaya'mu ga laway naupas.
S.PHON: i jajaʔmu ɣa lawaj naupas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的名字是Laway Naupas.
My mother is Laway Naupas.

S.FORM: ru yutasmu ga yupas na yupas.
S.PHON: ru jutas~ɕmu ɣa jupas~ɕ na jupas~ɕ.
S.FORM: ru yutasmu ga yupas na yupas.
S.PHON: ru jutas~ɕmu ɣa jupas~ɕ na jupas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 我爺爺叫Yupas na Talaw.
My grandfather is Yupas na Talaw.

S.FORM: ru kia na' yupas talaw ru talaw na kuwi' kuwi' qangqang ku nanavakis la.
S.PHON: ru kia naʔ jupas~ɕ talaw ru talaw na kuwiʔ kuwiʔ qaŋqaŋ ku nana*akis~ɕ la.
S.FORM: ru kia na' yupas talaw ru talaw na kuwi' kuwi' qangqang ku nanavakis la.
S.PHON: ru kia naʔ jupas~ɕ talaw ru talaw na kuwiʔ kuwiʔ qaŋqaŋ ku nana*akis~ɕ la.
S.TRANSL: 還有Yupas Talaw、Talaw na Kuwi'以及Kuwi' Qangqang這些祖先.

TRANSL.notes: And there were still (other) elderly people—Yupas Talaw, Talaw na Kuwi', and Kuwi' Qangqang.

S.TRANSL: And there were still elderly people—Yupas Talaw, Talaw na Kuwi', and Kuwi' Qangqang.

S.FORM: kagaw ku kagaw nawkeh ku ralu'mu ru.
S.PHON: kaɣaw ku kaɣaw nawkeħ ku raluʔmu ru.
S.FORM: kagaw ku kagaw nawkeh ku ralu'mu ru.
S.PHON: kaɣaw ku kaɣaw nawkeħ ku raluʔmu ru.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Kagaw Nawkeh.
My name is Kagaw, Kagaw nawkeh.

S.FORM: yaya'mu ga laway.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu ɣa lawaj.
S.FORM: yaya'mu ga laway.
S.PHON: jajaʔmu ɣa lawaj.
S.TRANSL: 我媽媽的名字叫Laway Naupas.
My mother is Laway Naupas.

S.FORM: ru ti su tataykay sami ga musa' sami i matawwaw ga.
S.PHON: ru ti s~ɕu tatajkaj s~ɕami ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami i matawwaw ɣa.
S.FORM: ru ti su tataykay sami ga musa' sami i matawwaw ga.
S.PHON: ru ti s~ɕu tatajkaj s~ɕami ɣa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami i matawwaw ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 在我們小的時候,我們去工作.
When we were young, we went to work.

S.FORM: mutux sami musa' matawwaw ru rasun sami matawwaw ni yaya'mu ru ki yava'mu.
S.PHON: mutux s~ɕami mus~ɕaʔ matawwaw ru ras~ɕun s~ɕami matawwaw ni jajaʔmu ru ki ja*aʔmu.
S.FORM: mutux sami musa' matawwaw ru rasun sami matawwaw ni yaya'mu ru ki yava'mu.
S.PHON: mutux s~ɕami mus~ɕaʔ matawwaw ru ras~ɕun s~ɕami matawwaw ni jajaʔmu ru ki ja*aʔmu.
S.TRANSL: 我們會去工作,然後我爸爸媽媽會帶我們去工作.
We would go working, and my father and mother would bring us to work.

S.FORM: tataykay sami yu.
S.PHON: tatajkaj s~ɕami ju.
S.FORM: tataykay sami yu.
S.PHON: tatajkaj s~ɕami ju.
S.TRANSL: 我們還很小哦.
We were quite little children then.

S.FORM: ini' sami viru' na' ga.
S.PHON: iniʔ s~ɕami *iruʔ naʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: ini' sami viru' na' ga.
S.PHON: iniʔ s~ɕami *iruʔ naʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我們還沒唸書.
We had not studied by that time.

S.FORM: ru musa' sami i matawwaw.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami i matawwaw.
S.FORM: ru musa' sami i matawwaw.
S.PHON: ru mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕami i matawwaw.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們去工作.
And we went to work.

S.FORM: matawwaw su mamayah ka tatuvuxan ga tumuvux tumuvux ru kumluh.
S.PHON: matawwaw s~ɕu mamajaħ ka tatu*uxan ɣa tumu*ux tumu*ux ru kumluħ.
S.FORM: matawwaw su mamayah ka tatuvuxan ga tumuvux tumuvux ru kumluh.
S.PHON: matawwaw s~ɕu mamajaħ ka tatu*uxan ɣa tumu*ux tumu*ux ru kumluħ.

TRANSL.notes: (這些)工作就是去旱地播種,播種和收割.

S.TRANSL: 工作就是去旱地播種,播種和收割.

TRANSL.notes: The work was to do sowing in the dry land. (We) did sowing and reaping.

S.TRANSL: The work was to do sowing in the dry land. did sowing and reaping.

S.FORM: ru i mahangngiq sami la ga pasibaqan sami pasibaqan kung su tuminun ni yaki la.
S.PHON: ru i maħaŋŋiq s~ɕami la ɣa pas~ɕiβaqan s~ɕami pas~ɕiβaqan kuŋ s~ɕu tuminun ni jaki la.
S.FORM: ru i mahangngiq sami la ga pasibaqan sami pasibaqan kung su tuminun ni yaki la.
S.PHON: ru i maħaŋŋiq s~ɕami la ɣa pas~ɕiβaqan s~ɕami pas~ɕiβaqan kuŋ s~ɕu tuminun ni jaki la.
S.TRANSL: 然後,我們休息的時候,年長的祖母會教我們編織.
And while we were having a rest, an elderly woman taught us how to weave.

S.FORM: i magalpu mamatu' kaal yu magalpu mamatu' kan ga vaq kung tuminun la pasipaqan kung ni yaki la ga vaq kung tuminun la.
S.PHON: i maɣalpu mamatuʔ kaal ju maɣalpu mamatuʔ kan ɣa *aq kuŋ tuminun la pas~ɕipaqan kuŋ ni jaki la ɣa *aq kuŋ tuminun la.
S.FORM: i magalpu mamatu' kaal yu magalpu mamatu' kan ga vaq kung tuminun la pasipaqan kung ni yaki la ga vaq kung tuminun la.
S.PHON: i maɣalpu mamatuʔ kaal ju maɣalpu mamatuʔ kan ɣa *aq kuŋ tuminun la pas~ɕipaqan kuŋ ni jaki la ɣa *aq kuŋ tuminun la.
S.TRANSL: 當我十六歲的時候,十六歲的時候,我就學會編織.Yaki教我,我就會了.
woman taught me about it, and then I knew how.

S.FORM: uwan ga mana'aring ru.
S.PHON: uwan ɣa manaʔariŋ ru.
S.FORM: uwan ga mana'aring ru.
S.PHON: uwan ɣa manaʔariŋ ru.
S.TRANSL: 是的,開始一直.

TRANSL.notes: Yes, (we) started.

S.TRANSL: Yes, started.

S.FORM: aru aruwa aruwa kung i vaq la ka.
S.PHON: aru aruwa aruwa kuŋ i *aq la ka.
S.FORM: aru aruwa aruwa kung i vaq la ka.
S.PHON: aru aruwa aruwa kuŋ i *aq la ka.

TRANSL.notes: 我愈來愈會(織布).

S.TRANSL: 我愈來愈會 .

TRANSL.notes: I became more and more adept (at weaving).

S.TRANSL: I became more and more adept .

S.FORM: paqibaqanmu kahavag ka yayihung na ta tuminun la ga.
S.PHON: paqiβaqanmu kaħa*aɣ ka jajiħuŋ na ta tuminun la ɣa.
S.FORM: paqibaqanmu kahavag ka yayihung na ta tuminun la ga.
S.PHON: paqiβaqanmu kaħa*aɣ ka jajiħuŋ na ta tuminun la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我學全部的編織方法,包括困難的.
I learned all of the weaving skills, including very difficult ones.

S.FORM: ru vaq kuing la a' vaq kuing la.
S.PHON: ru *aq kuiŋ la aʔ *aq kuiŋ la.
S.FORM: ru vaq kuing la a' vaq kuing la.
S.PHON: ru *aq kuiŋ la aʔ *aq kuiŋ la.
S.TRANSL: 然後我會了,我會.

TRANSL.notes: And then, I knew how (to weave). I was able (to weave).

S.TRANSL: And then, I knew how . I was able .

S.FORM: uwal uwal ga musa' matawwaw ru i tumuvux ru naqaru' ku tumuvux la ga.
S.PHON: uwal uwal ɣa mus~ɕaʔ matawwaw ru i tumu*ux ru naqaruʔ ku tumu*ux la ɣa.
S.FORM: uwal uwal ga musa' matawwaw ru i tumuvux ru naqaru' ku tumuvux la ga.
S.PHON: uwal uwal ɣa mus~ɕaʔ matawwaw ru i tumu*ux ru naqaruʔ ku tumu*ux la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 是的是的,去工作,然後.播種,然後結束播種.

TRANSL.notes: Yes. Yes. (We) went to work and. We did the sowing and then finished it.

S.TRANSL: Yes. Yes. went to work and. We did the sowing and then finished it.

S.FORM: mahangniq imuwaw la ku nanavakis la sami ka nanavakis sunga' mahangniq i muwaw la ru.
S.PHON: maħaŋniq imuwaw la ku nana*akis~ɕ la s~ɕami ka nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ maħaŋniq i muwaw la ru.
S.FORM: mahangniq imuwaw la ku nanavakis la sami ka nanavakis sunga' mahangniq i muwaw la ru.
S.PHON: maħaŋniq imuwaw la ku nana*akis~ɕ la s~ɕami ka nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ maħaŋniq i muwaw la ru.

TRANSL.notes: 以前的老人們在家休息,我們這些老人(包括說話者自己,現在)以前在家休息.

S.TRANSL: 以前的老人們在家休息,我們這些老人 以前在家休息.
In the past, the elderly rested at home, and now we the elder ones rested at home before.

S.FORM: tuminun ku kakanayrin ga musa' i qumluwap ku na tatamalung hiya'.
S.PHON: tuminun ku kakanajrin ɣa mus~ɕaʔ i qumluwap ku na tatamaluŋ ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: tuminun ku kakanayrin ga musa' i qumluwap ku na tatamalung hiya'.
S.PHON: tuminun ku kakanajrin ɣa mus~ɕaʔ i qumluwap ku na tatamaluŋ ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 婦女們編織,男人們去打獵.
Women did the weaving and Men went hunting.

S.FORM: musa' qumluwap ku tatamalung hiya' kumiyum su raramat mi.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ qumluwap ku tatamaluŋ ħijaʔ kumijum s~ɕu raramat mi.
S.FORM: musa' qumluwap ku tatamalung hiya' kumiyum su raramat mi.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ qumluwap ku tatamaluŋ ħijaʔ kumijum s~ɕu raramat mi.
S.TRANSL: 男人們去打獵,找菜.
Men went hunting, and looked for food.

S.FORM: i sunga' ga ini' vaynay su raramat ga ini' vaynay gi ukas a pila' ukas a patagasahuan ukas pila' ru musa' i i kumiyum su raramat lahulahu mi ku tatamalong.
S.PHON: i s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa iniʔ *ajnaj s~ɕu raramat ɣa iniʔ *ajnaj ɣi ukas~ɕ a pilaʔ ukas~ɕ a pataɣas~ɕaħuan ukas~ɕ pilaʔ ru mus~ɕaʔ i i kumijum s~ɕu raramat laħulaħu mi ku tatamaloŋ.
S.FORM: i sunga' ga ini' vaynay su raramat ga ini' vaynay gi ukas a pila' ukas a patagasahuan ukas pila' ru musa' i i kumiyum su raramat lahulahu mi ku tatamalong.
S.PHON: i s~ɕuŋaʔ ɣa iniʔ *ajnaj s~ɕu raramat ɣa iniʔ *ajnaj ɣi ukas~ɕ a pilaʔ ukas~ɕ a pataɣas~ɕaħuan ukas~ɕ pilaʔ ru mus~ɕaʔ i i kumijum s~ɕu raramat laħulaħu mi ku tatamaloŋ.
S.TRANSL: 以前沒有買菜這種事.我們不會買東西吃,因為我們沒有錢,沒有賺錢的工作.我們沒有錢,而且男人們在山上找尋食物.
money. We had no money and men went to look for food in the mountains.

S.FORM: ga tuminun imuwag ku kakanayrin hiya' ru.
S.PHON: ɣa tuminun imuwaɣ ku kakanajrin ħijaʔ ru.
S.FORM: ga tuminun imuwag ku kakanayrin hiya' ru.
S.PHON: ɣa tuminun imuwaɣ ku kakanajrin ħijaʔ ru.
S.TRANSL: 在家編織是女人們的事.
Women did the weaving at home.

S.FORM: tiku raramatniyam ga yahu la.
S.PHON: tiku raramatnijam ɣa jaħu la.
S.FORM: tiku raramatniyam ga yahu la.
S.PHON: tiku raramatnijam ɣa jaħu la.
S.TRANSL: 我們的菜是山茼蒿.
Fireweeds were for the meals.

S.FORM: yahu yahu vay i lahulahu.
S.PHON: jaħu jaħu *aj i laħulaħu.
S.FORM: yahu yahu vay i lahulahu.
S.PHON: jaħu jaħu *aj i laħulaħu.
S.TRANSL: 真的是山上的山茼蒿.
They were really fireweeds in the mountains.

S.FORM: kumiyut su yahu ru kiya tikay a paruxaw uwi gaghap na paruxaw ga.
S.PHON: kumijut s~ɕu jaħu ru kija tikaj a paruxaw uwi ɣaɣħap na paruxaw ɣa.
S.FORM: kumiyut su yahu ru kiya tikay a paruxaw uwi gaghap na paruxaw ga.
S.PHON: kumijut s~ɕu jaħu ru kija tikaj a paruxaw uwi ɣaɣħap na paruxaw ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 摘山茼蒿,然後有一點青菜和菜籽.
We plucked fireweeds and so we had some vegetable and seeds.

S.FORM: tumuvux tikay su paruxaw i mamayah ru nanu' yani ku siramat a.
S.PHON: tumu*ux tikaj s~ɕu paruxaw i mamajaħ ru nanuʔ jani ku s~ɕiramat a.
S.FORM: tumuvux tikay su paruxaw i mamayah ru nanu' yani ku siramat a.
S.PHON: tumu*ux tikaj s~ɕu paruxaw i mamajaħ ru nanuʔ jani ku s~ɕiramat a.
S.TRANSL: 播一些菜籽在旱地,然後那邊種的就當菜來吃.
We sowed some of the seeds on the dry land, and what grew there was for eating.

S.FORM: vali i pakaavura' uwi.
S.PHON: *ali i pakaa*uraʔ uwi.
S.FORM: vali i pakaavura' uwi.
S.PHON: *ali i pakaa*uraʔ uwi.
S.TRANSL: 也沒有用油.
We did not use oil either.

S.FORM: ini' pakasiyus mi.
S.PHON: iniʔ pakas~ɕijus~ɕ mi.
S.FORM: ini' pakasiyus mi.
S.PHON: iniʔ pakas~ɕijus~ɕ mi.
S.TRANSL: 沒有用油.
We used no oil.

S.FORM: ini' pakasiyus su raramat asi tahki na a qusia' ku raramatniyam su sunga'.
S.PHON: iniʔ pakas~ɕijus~ɕ s~ɕu raramat as~ɕi taħki na a qus~ɕiaʔ ku raramatnijam s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: ini' pakasiyus su raramat asi tahki na a qusia' ku raramatniyam su sunga'.
S.PHON: iniʔ pakas~ɕijus~ɕ s~ɕu raramat as~ɕi taħki na a qus~ɕiaʔ ku raramatnijam s~ɕu s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 沒有用油煮菜,以前還是只能用水煮.
We cooked without oil. In the past, our food could only be cooked with water.

S.FORM: ru mutux i ini' sami usa' hugal uwi mi gi i quwis gi ukas a pila' ka a'usa' quwis.
S.PHON: ru mutux i iniʔ s~ɕami us~ɕaʔ ħuɣal uwi mi ɣi i quwis~ɕ ɣi ukas~ɕ a pilaʔ ka aʔus~ɕaʔ quwis~ɕ.
S.FORM: ru mutux i ini' sami usa' hugal uwi mi gi i quwis gi ukas a pila' ka a'usa' quwis.
S.PHON: ru mutux i iniʔ s~ɕami us~ɕaʔ ħuɣal uwi mi ɣi i quwis~ɕ ɣi ukas~ɕ a pilaʔ ka aʔus~ɕaʔ quwis~ɕ.

TRANSL.notes: 還有我們也不會去下面(山下),因為我們沒有錢去平地.

S.TRANSL: 還有我們也不會去下面 ,因為我們沒有錢去平地.
And we weren't able to go to the lower ground because we had no money to go to the lower ground.

S.FORM: ru ingasu la ru ru mutux i musa' hugal la ga.
S.PHON: ru iŋas~ɕu la ru ru mutux i mus~ɕaʔ ħuɣal la ɣa.
S.FORM: ru ingasu la ru ru mutux i musa' hugal la ga.
S.PHON: ru iŋas~ɕu la ru ru mutux i mus~ɕaʔ ħuɣal la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 很久之後,然後,我們就能去下面囉.
After a long time, and we were able to go down to the lower ground.

S.FORM: musa' i kia kia pila' la matagasaihu' la tikay ga.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i kia kia pilaʔ la mataɣas~ɕaiħuʔ la tikaj ɣa.
S.FORM: musa' i kia kia pila' la matagasaihu' la tikay ga.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i kia kia pilaʔ la mataɣas~ɕaiħuʔ la tikaj ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 去,嗯,有錢了,去工作賺了一點錢.

TRANSL.notes: (We) went there. We had money. We went to work and earned some money.

S.TRANSL: went there. We had money. We went to work and earned some money.

S.FORM: kia pila' la ga musa' i mavaynay tikay su raramat i hugal la mi i quwis la.
S.PHON: kia pilaʔ la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ i ma*ajnaj tikaj s~ɕu raramat i ħuɣal la mi i quwis~ɕ la.
S.FORM: kia pila' la ga musa' i mavaynay tikay su raramat i hugal la mi i quwis la.
S.PHON: kia pilaʔ la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ i ma*ajnaj tikaj s~ɕu raramat i ħuɣal la mi i quwis~ɕ la.
S.TRANSL: 有錢之後我們會去下面平地買一點菜.
After having some money, we went to the lower ground to buy some food.

S.FORM: musa' mavaynay su ramat ru humakay yu vali i kiya kulu' sunga'.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ ma*ajnaj s~ɕu ramat ru ħumakaj ju *ali i kija kuluʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: musa' mavaynay su ramat ru humakay yu vali i kiya kulu' sunga'.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ ma*ajnaj s~ɕu ramat ru ħumakaj ju *ali i kija kuluʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們去買菜,然後用走的喲.以前沒有車子.
We went to buy food, and we did so on foot. There was no car before.

S.FORM: musa' pakaragiyax ga humakay ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ pakaraɣijax ɣa ħumakaj ru.
S.FORM: musa' pakaragiyax ga humakay ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ pakaraɣijax ɣa ħumakaj ru.
S.TRANSL: 我走路去大湖.

TRANSL.notes: (I) walked to Pakaragiyax.

S.TRANSL: walked to Pakaragiyax.

S.FORM: mutux pansiviliq ru.
S.PHON: mutux pans~ɕi*iliq ru.
S.FORM: mutux pansiviliq ru.
S.PHON: mutux pans~ɕi*iliq ru.
S.TRANSL: 我會帶便當.
I would bring the mealbox with me.

S.FORM: musa' i maniq su tahbuyi i samkayk ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i maniq s~ɕu taħβuji i s~ɕamkajk ru.
S.FORM: musa' i maniq su tahbuyi i samkayk ru.
S.PHON: mus~ɕaʔ i maniq s~ɕu taħβuji i s~ɕamkajk ru.

TRANSL.notes: 我去Samkayk(吃)豆腐乳.

S.TRANSL: 我去Samkayk 豆腐乳.
I went to Samkayk to have fermented soybean curd.

S.FORM: humakay ru qutux riax ga musa' pakaragiyax sunga'.
S.PHON: ħumakaj ru qutux riax ɣa mus~ɕaʔ pakaraɣijax s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: humakay ru qutux riax ga musa' pakaragiyax sunga'.
S.PHON: ħumakaj ru qutux riax ɣa mus~ɕaʔ pakaraɣijax s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 以前去大湖走路要走一天.
In the past it took one day to walk to Pakaragiyax.

S.FORM: gi humakay gi vali kia a kulu' sunga'.
S.PHON: ɣi ħumakaj ɣi *ali kia a kuluʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.FORM: gi humakay gi vali kia a kulu' sunga'.
S.PHON: ɣi ħumakaj ɣi *ali kia a kuluʔ s~ɕuŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們走路,因為以前沒有車子.

TRANSL.notes: (We) walked there, because there was no car before.

S.TRANSL: walked there, because there was no car before.

S.FORM: ru muwah i musa' kariax kia ru muwah humakay lawi qutux ri'ax la a gavian la mi.
S.PHON: ru muwaħ i mus~ɕaʔ kariax kia ru muwaħ ħumakaj lawi qutux riʔax la a ɣa*ian la mi.
S.FORM: ru muwah i musa' kariax kia ru muwah humakay lawi qutux ri'ax la a gavian la mi.
S.PHON: ru muwaħ i mus~ɕaʔ kariax kia ru muwaħ ħumakaj lawi qutux riʔax la a ɣa*ian la mi.
S.TRANSL: 然後我去那邊吃中飯,然後再走路回來.這樣就一天了,就天黑了.
by the time the sun had set.

S.FORM: vali asi nku hani la ga musa' ga su pilapilag musa' ru muwah.
S.PHON: *ali as~ɕi nku ħani la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ ɣa s~ɕu pilapilaɣ mus~ɕaʔ ru muwaħ.
S.FORM: vali asi nku hani la ga musa' ga su pilapilag musa' ru muwah.
S.PHON: *ali as~ɕi nku ħani la ɣa mus~ɕaʔ ɣa s~ɕu pilapilaɣ mus~ɕaʔ ru muwaħ.
S.TRANSL: 不像現在你去的時候,去一下子,又回來.
It was unlike now that it takes you just a little time to go back and forth.

S.FORM: ini' kanga' muwah gi kiya a kulu' la ru.
S.PHON: iniʔ kaŋaʔ muwaħ ɣi kija a kuluʔ la ru.
S.FORM: ini' kanga' muwah gi kiya a kulu' la ru.
S.PHON: iniʔ kaŋaʔ muwaħ ɣi kija a kuluʔ la ru.
S.TRANSL: 你會很快回來,因為有車.
You can come back quickly because now we have cars.

S.FORM: sunga' hiya' ga aqih kinqiyanux i.
S.PHON: s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ ɣa aqiħ kinqijanux i.
S.FORM: sunga' hiya' ga aqih kinqiyanux i.
S.PHON: s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ ɣa aqiħ kinqijanux i.
S.TRANSL: 以前是生活不好.
The life before was not good.

S.FORM: ini' u ukas a pila'.
S.PHON: iniʔ u ukas~ɕ a pilaʔ.
S.FORM: ini' u ukas a pila'.
S.PHON: iniʔ u ukas~ɕ a pilaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 以前沒有錢.
There was no money.

S.FORM: ku nanavakis sunga' hiya'.
S.PHON: ku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: ku nanavakis sunga' hiya'.
S.PHON: ku nana*akis~ɕ s~ɕuŋaʔ ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 以前老人家們也沒有錢.
The old men had no money before.

S.FORM: uwal ga.
S.PHON: uwal ɣa.
S.FORM: uwal ga.
S.PHON: uwal ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 是啊.
Yes.

S.FORM: rasun sami matawwaw nku yava' yaya' ga.
S.PHON: ras~ɕun s~ɕami matawwaw nku ja*aʔ jajaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: rasun sami matawwaw nku yava' yaya' ga.
S.PHON: ras~ɕun s~ɕami matawwaw nku ja*aʔ jajaʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 父母親帶我們去工作.
Father and Mother brought us to work.

S.FORM: mutuxsami naha' rasun matawwaw pasibaqansami naha' matawwaw aring tikay gi ini' viru'.
S.PHON: mutuxs~ɕami naħaʔ ras~ɕun matawwaw pas~ɕiβaqans~ɕami naħaʔ matawwaw ariŋ tikaj ɣi iniʔ *iruʔ.
S.FORM: mutuxsami naha' rasun matawwaw pasibaqansami naha' matawwaw aring tikay gi ini' viru'.
S.PHON: mutuxs~ɕami naħaʔ ras~ɕun matawwaw pas~ɕiβaqans~ɕami naħaʔ matawwaw ariŋ tikaj ɣi iniʔ *iruʔ.
S.TRANSL: 他們會帶我們去工作,教我們怎麼做事.小時候一開始我沒有上學讀書.

TRANSL.notes: They (the parents) would bring us to work, and taught us how to do it. At the beginning of my childhood I did not study.

S.TRANSL: They would bring us to work, and taught us how to do it. At the beginning of my childhood I did not study.

S.FORM: jusi tumuvux a.
S.PHON: jus~ɕi tumu*ux a.
S.FORM: jusi tumuvux a.
S.PHON: jus~ɕi tumu*ux a.
S.TRANSL: 就是播種.
It was just sowing.

S.FORM: nanu' tumuvux ru pati' ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tumu*ux ru patiʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: nanu' tumuvux ru pati' ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tumu*ux ru patiʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 就是播種,還有稻秧.
It was just sowing and rice plants.

S.FORM: tumuvux ru mumuwa' su kgi.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ru mumuwaʔ s~ɕu kɣi.
S.FORM: tumuvux ru mumuwa' su kgi.
S.PHON: tumu*ux ru mumuwaʔ s~ɕu kɣi.
S.TRANSL: 我們播種然後種苧蔴.

TRANSL.notes: (We) sowed and grew the Chinese silk plants.

S.TRANSL: sowed and grew the Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: kgi ga.
S.PHON: kɣi ɣa.
S.FORM: kgi ga.
S.PHON: kɣi ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 苧蔴.
The Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: ka kamagisan ru vinasun ga ku kgi ka yani.
S.PHON: ka kamaɣis~ɕan ru *inas~ɕun ɣa ku kɣi ka jani.
S.FORM: ka kamagisan ru vinasun ga ku kgi ka yani.
S.PHON: ka kamaɣis~ɕan ru *inas~ɕun ɣa ku kɣi ka jani.
S.TRANSL: 我們把它去皮然後賣掉苧蔴.

TRANSL.notes: (We) had it peeled off there and sold the Chinese silk plants.

S.TRANSL: had it peeled off there and sold the Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: ku nanuwan.
S.PHON: ku nanuwan.
S.FORM: ku nanuwan.
S.PHON: ku nanuwan.
S.TRANSL: 是什麼?
What is it?

S.FORM: nanu' tinunun ku ruma'.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tinunun ku rumaʔ.
S.FORM: nanu' tinunun ku ruma'.
S.PHON: nanuʔ tinunun ku rumaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 有些拿來編織.
There was some for weaving.

S.FORM: kiya ku magan sku nanuka' la ga kgi la ga nanuka'.
S.PHON: kija ku maɣan s~ɕku nanukaʔ la ɣa kɣi la ɣa nanukaʔ.
S.FORM: kiya ku magan sku nanuka' la ga kgi la ga nanuka'.
S.PHON: kija ku maɣan s~ɕku nanukaʔ la ɣa kɣi la ɣa nanukaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們拿乾的苧蔴.

TRANSL.notes: (We) took the dry Chinese silk plants (for weaving).

S.TRANSL: took the dry Chinese silk plants .

S.FORM: la ru mumuwa' su payux la ru tinunun ku ruma' ga ga vinasun ku ruma'.
S.PHON: la ru mumuwaʔ s~ɕu pajux la ru tinunun ku rumaʔ ɣa ɣa *inas~ɕun ku rumaʔ.
S.FORM: la ru mumuwa' su payux la ru tinunun ku ruma' ga ga vinasun ku ruma'.
S.PHON: la ru mumuwaʔ s~ɕu pajux la ru tinunun ku rumaʔ ɣa ɣa *inas~ɕun ku rumaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 我們種了很多苧蔴,有些拿來編織.有些拿來賣.
We grew a lot of Chinese silk plants and had some for weaving, some for trading.

S.FORM: nanu' u kiya mavaynay kiya ku vavinasan su kgi nanuka' la ga kgi la ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u kija ma*ajnaj kija ku *a*inas~ɕan s~ɕu kɣi nanukaʔ la ɣa kɣi la ɣa.
S.FORM: nanu' u kiya mavaynay kiya ku vavinasan su kgi nanuka' la ga kgi la ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ u kija ma*ajnaj kija ku *a*inas~ɕan s~ɕu kɣi nanukaʔ la ɣa kɣi la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 就是有拿來賣.有賣苧蔴和乾的苧蔴.
There was just buying. There was selling Chinese silk plants and dry Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: kiya pila' la gi ku payux la ku.
S.PHON: kija pilaʔ la ɣi ku pajux la ku.
S.FORM: kiya pila' la gi ku payux la ku.
S.PHON: kija pilaʔ la ɣi ku pajux la ku.
S.TRANSL: 因為有很多苧蔴,所以我們有錢.
We had money because there was a lot of Chinese silk plants.

S.FORM: pamuwaun ka kgi la ru nanu' u kia halan mavaynay la ga kia pila' la.
S.PHON: pamuwaun ka kɣi la ru nanuʔ u kia ħalan ma*ajnaj la ɣa kia pilaʔ la.
S.FORM: pamuwaun ka kgi la ru nanu' u kia halan mavaynay la ga kia pila' la.
S.PHON: pamuwaun ka kɣi la ru nanuʔ u kia ħalan ma*ajnaj la ɣa kia pilaʔ la.
S.TRANSL: 我們種苧蔴,拿去賣然後就有錢了.

TRANSL.notes: We grew Chinese silk plants just. We went to sell (them ) and we had money.

S.TRANSL: We grew Chinese silk plants just. We went to sell and we had money.

S.FORM: sku mana'aring han ga ukas ukas ku pinmuwa'niyam ka vavinasun ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕku manaʔariŋ ħan ɣa ukas~ɕ ukas~ɕ ku pinmuwaʔnijam ka *a*inas~ɕun ɣa.
S.FORM: sku mana'aring han ga ukas ukas ku pinmuwa'niyam ka vavinasun ga.
S.PHON: s~ɕku manaʔariŋ ħan ɣa ukas~ɕ ukas~ɕ ku pinmuwaʔnijam ka *a*inas~ɕun ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 一開始的時候,沒有東西可以種來賣.
In the very beginning, there was nothing that we grew for sale.

S.FORM: nanu' nanuka' ga tiku nanuka' ga ga kanukaun ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ nanukaʔ ɣa tiku nanukaʔ ɣa ɣa kanukaun ɣa.
S.FORM: nanu' nanuka' ga tiku nanuka' ga ga kanukaun ga.
S.PHON: nanuʔ nanukaʔ ɣa tiku nanukaʔ ɣa ɣa kanukaun ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 乾的苧蔴曬乾後綁在一起.
They were dried by sunshine and tied together

S.FORM: kanukaun ru payux ku vakuwi la ga.
S.PHON: kanukaun ru pajux ku *akuwi la ɣa.
S.FORM: kanukaun ru payux ku vakuwi la ga.
S.PHON: kanukaun ru pajux ku *akuwi la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 很多都曬乾再綁起來.
A lot of them were dried and tied together.

S.FORM: patisaun la ru.
S.PHON: patis~ɕaun la ru.
S.FORM: patisaun la ru.
S.PHON: patis~ɕaun la ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們再把它們製成線.

TRANSL.notes: (We ) made (them) threads.

S.TRANSL: made threads.

S.FORM: jusi palawsun la.
S.PHON: jus~ɕi palaws~ɕun la.
S.FORM: jusi palawsun la.
S.PHON: jus~ɕi palaws~ɕun la.
S.TRANSL: 我們做成線.

TRANSL.notes: (We) made (them) threads.

S.TRANSL: made threads.

S.FORM: palawsun la ru.
S.PHON: palaws~ɕun la ru.
S.FORM: palawsun la ru.
S.PHON: palaws~ɕun la ru.
S.TRANSL: 我們做成線.

TRANSL.notes: (We) made (them) threads.

S.TRANSL: made threads.

S.FORM: magawayay la ga.
S.PHON: maɣawajaj la ɣa.
S.FORM: magawayay la ga.
S.PHON: maɣawajaj la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 做成線.

TRANSL.notes: (We) made (them) threads.

S.TRANSL: made threads.

S.FORM: magawayay tahkun la.
S.PHON: maɣawajaj taħkun la.
S.FORM: magawayay tahkun la.
S.PHON: maɣawajaj taħkun la.
S.TRANSL: 做成線之後拿去煮.

TRANSL.notes: (We) made (them) threads and cooked (for later dying).

S.TRANSL: made threads and cooked .

S.FORM: tahkun ru pugian ru marngu' la ga.
S.PHON: taħkun ru puɣian ru marŋuʔ la ɣa.
S.FORM: tahkun ru pugian ru marngu' la ga.
S.PHON: taħkun ru puɣian ru marŋuʔ la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 煮了之後拿去曬乾.

TRANSL.notes: (We) had (them) cooked, exposed to the sun, and dried.

S.TRANSL: had cooked, exposed to the sun, and dried.

S.FORM: la ga hangaun su a'imaw.
S.PHON: la ɣa ħaŋaun s~ɕu aʔimaw.
S.FORM: la ga hangaun su a'imaw.
S.PHON: la ɣa ħaŋaun s~ɕu aʔimaw.
S.TRANSL: 把這些東西拿去浸.

TRANSL.notes: (We) immersed the things (for dying) to be mixed.

S.TRANSL: immersed the things to be mixed.

S.FORM: payux ku asiki kiya ku a'imawniya' ga.
S.PHON: pajux ku as~ɕiki kija ku aʔimawnijaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: payux ku asiki kiya ku a'imawniya' ga.
S.PHON: pajux ku as~ɕiki kija ku aʔimawnijaʔ ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 很多的(染料).一定要有攪拌的東西.

S.TRANSL: 很多的 .一定要有攪拌的東西.

TRANSL.notes: A lot of (dying ingredients). There must be things (dying ingredients) to be mixed.

S.TRANSL: A lot of . There must be things to be mixed.

S.FORM: makalux ga makalux magturakis ga mgaturakis matasiq ga matasiq.
S.PHON: makalux ɣa makalux maɣturakis~ɕ ɣa mɣaturakis~ɕ matas~ɕiq ɣa matas~ɕiq.
S.FORM: makalux ga makalux magturakis ga mgaturakis matasiq ga matasiq.
S.PHON: makalux ɣa makalux maɣturakis~ɕ ɣa mɣaturakis~ɕ matas~ɕiq ɣa matas~ɕiq.
S.TRANSL: 黑色的就是黑色,小米色的就是小米色,綠色的就是綠色.
Black is black. The millet color is the millet color. Green is then Green.

S.FORM: ru hangaun na hasa ga.
S.PHON: ru ħaŋaun na ħas~ɕa ɣa.
S.FORM: ru hangaun na hasa ga.
S.PHON: ru ħaŋaun na ħas~ɕa ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 然後用那個浸泡.

TRANSL.notes: And the (threads) was immersed.

S.TRANSL: And the was immersed.

S.FORM: makalux ga.
S.PHON: makalux ɣa.
S.FORM: makalux ga.
S.PHON: makalux ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 就是黑色.
It's black.

S.FORM: hangaun na avaw na hukilu' hangaun slaq ga.
S.PHON: ħaŋaun na a*aw na ħukiluʔ ħaŋaun s~ɕlaq ɣa.
S.FORM: hangaun na avaw na hukilu' hangaun slaq ga.
S.PHON: ħaŋaun na a*aw na ħukiluʔ ħaŋaun s~ɕlaq ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我們用九芎樹的葉子浸,浸在稀泥裡.
had them immersed in mud.

S.FORM: qamasan na avaw na h avaw na hukilu' han ru.
S.PHON: qamas~ɕan na a*aw na ħ a*aw na ħukiluʔ ħan ru.
S.FORM: qamasan na avaw na h avaw na hukilu' han ru.
S.PHON: qamas~ɕan na a*aw na ħ a*aw na ħukiluʔ ħan ru.
S.TRANSL: 用葉子浸,先用九芎樹的葉子.
Subcostata.

S.FORM: tapaqun ku avaw na hukilu' ru siqumas suku wayay ga.
S.PHON: tapaqun ku a*aw na ħukiluʔ ru s~ɕiqumas~ɕ s~ɕuku wajaj ɣa.
S.FORM: tapaqun ku avaw na hukilu' ru siqumas suku wayay ga.
S.PHON: tapaqun ku a*aw na ħukiluʔ ru s~ɕiqumas~ɕ s~ɕuku wajaj ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 我們用力搥打九芎樹的葉子,再和線混合.
the threads.

S.FORM: ru halan humangu sku slaq ka slaq suvalay ka lamlam ga.
S.PHON: ru ħalan ħumaŋu s~ɕku s~ɕlaq ka s~ɕlaq s~ɕu*alaj ka lamlam ɣa.
S.FORM: ru halan humangu sku slaq ka slaq suvalay ka lamlam ga.
S.PHON: ru ħalan ħumaŋu s~ɕku s~ɕlaq ka s~ɕlaq s~ɕu*alaj ka lamlam ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 然後我們去浸在田裡,真的在水田裡這樣做.
watery mud.

S.FORM: halan humangu' kiya ru makarusa' la ga alun la.
S.PHON: ħalan ħumaŋuʔ kija ru makarus~ɕaʔ la ɣa alun la.
S.FORM: halan humangu' kiya ru makarusa' la ga alun la.
S.PHON: ħalan ħumaŋuʔ kija ru makarus~ɕaʔ la ɣa alun la.
S.TRANSL: 浸在那裡然後兩天後再拿出來.

TRANSL.notes: (We) went to (have them) immersed and took them out two days later.

S.TRANSL: went to immersed and took them out two days later.

S.FORM: la ga makalux la.
S.PHON: la ɣa makalux la.
S.FORM: la ga makalux la.
S.PHON: la ɣa makalux la.
S.TRANSL: 就變成黑色了.
Then it turned black.

S.FORM: ru tiku ku maru' hiya' ga kamti' hangaun na kamti' ru matasiq ga kiya ku ki'man ga kiya ga ku ki'man.
S.PHON: ru tiku ku maruʔ ħijaʔ ɣa kamtiʔ ħaŋaun na kamtiʔ ru matas~ɕiq ɣa kija ku kiʔman ɣa kija ɣa ku kiʔman.
S.FORM: ru tiku ku maru' hiya' ga kamti' hangaun na kamti' ru matasiq ga kiya ku ki'man ga kiya ga ku ki'man.
S.PHON: ru tiku ku maruʔ ħijaʔ ɣa kamtiʔ ħaŋaun na kamtiʔ ru matas~ɕiq ɣa kija ku kiʔman ɣa kija ɣa ku kiʔman.
S.TRANSL: 然後,薯榔,薯榔.和薯榔一起浸泡,有草讓它們變綠.
And Dioscorea Matsudae. Dioscorea Matsudae. We had them immersed with Dioscorea Matsudae and there were grasses to make them greeen.

S.FORM: ana sku hani ga kia ku ki'man.
S.PHON: ana s~ɕku ħani ɣa kia ku kiʔman.
S.FORM: ana sku hani ga kia ku ki'man.
S.PHON: ana s~ɕku ħani ɣa kia ku kiʔman.
S.TRANSL: 到現在還有這種草.
There is such grass until now.

S.FORM: ka yani mutumu talan.
S.PHON: ka jani mutumu talan.
S.FORM: ka yani mutumu talan.
S.PHON: ka jani mutumu talan.
S.TRANSL: 我會看到那個.
I would see that.

S.FORM: tapaqun ku yani ru siqumas kiya la ga matasiq la.
S.PHON: tapaqun ku jani ru s~ɕiqumas~ɕ kija la ɣa matas~ɕiq la.
S.FORM: tapaqun ku yani ru siqumas kiya la ga matasiq la.
S.PHON: tapaqun ku jani ru s~ɕiqumas~ɕ kija la ɣa matas~ɕiq la.
S.TRANSL: 把它搗爛然後和線團揉合在一起,就變成綠色.

TRANSL.notes: (We) pounded it and massaged the threads with it, so it was green.

S.TRANSL: pounded it and massaged the threads with it, so it was green.

S.FORM: payux ga ga aqih gi ini' ini'mu qavaqani kumal ku asiki talan.
S.PHON: pajux ɣa ɣa aqiħ ɣi iniʔ iniʔmu qa*aqani kumal ku as~ɕiki talan.
S.FORM: payux ga ga aqih gi ini' ini'mu qavaqani kumal ku asiki talan.
S.PHON: pajux ɣa ɣa aqiħ ɣi iniʔ iniʔmu qa*aqani kumal ku as~ɕiki talan.
S.TRANSL: 很多我都不會描述,要看到東西才行.
There is a lot that I can't describe. I need to have it here.

S.FORM: uwal a.
S.PHON: uwal a.
S.FORM: uwal a.
S.PHON: uwal a.
S.TRANSL: 是啊.
Yes.

S.FORM: pat u pa' u wayay la ga.
S.PHON: pat u paʔ u wajaj la ɣa.
S.FORM: pat u pa' u wayay la ga.
S.PHON: pat u paʔ u wajaj la ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 就變成線了.
It then becomes threads.

S.FORM: parumulun la.
S.PHON: parumulun la.
S.FORM: parumulun la.
S.PHON: parumulun la.
S.TRANSL: 就變成線團.

TRANSL.notes: (We) make it into balls of threads.

S.TRANSL: make it into balls of threads.

S.FORM: parumulun la ru ju.
S.PHON: parumulun la ru ju.
S.FORM: parumulun la ru ju.
S.PHON: parumulun la ru ju.
S.TRANSL: 把它繞成線團.

TRANSL.notes: (We) coil them into balls.

S.TRANSL: coil them into balls.

S.FORM: qalasayun la.
S.PHON: qalas~ɕajun la.
S.FORM: qalasayun la.
S.PHON: qalas~ɕajun la.

TRANSL.notes: 我們把線繞(在織布機上).

S.TRANSL: 我們把線繞 .

TRANSL.notes: (We) coil the threads (on the weaving box).

S.TRANSL: coil the threads .

S.FORM: qalasayun la ru tinunun la.
S.PHON: qalas~ɕajun la ru tinunun la.
S.FORM: qalasayun la ru tinunun la.
S.PHON: qalas~ɕajun la ru tinunun la.

TRANSL.notes: 我們繞線(在織布機上),然後編織.

S.TRANSL: 我們繞線 ,然後編織.

TRANSL.notes: (We) coil the threads and weave.

S.TRANSL: coil the threads and weave.

S.FORM: ru ru kiya a la tiku lin tiku linamu' ga.
S.PHON: ru ru kija a la tiku lin tiku linamuʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: ru ru kiya a la tiku lin tiku linamu' ga.
S.PHON: ru ru kija a la tiku lin tiku linamuʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 然後有配好的顏色.
And there is chosen stuff

S.FORM: velayq talan ku linamu' ga vaq su waw ma.
S.PHON: *elajq talan ku linamuʔ ɣa *aq s~ɕu waw ma.
S.FORM: velayq talan ku linamu' ga vaq su waw ma.
S.PHON: *elajq talan ku linamuʔ ɣa *aq s~ɕu waw ma.

TRANSL.notes: 顏色配得好看,(別人)就說(這個人)很會做(編織的)事.

S.TRANSL: 顏色配得好看, 就說 很會做 事.
If the chosen colors look good, others will say that you are good at weaving.

S.FORM: maha ku nanavakis ini' qavaq la ga yani ku tana asinaha' tamalxi la ka ukas ku linamu' ga.
S.PHON: maħa ku nana*akis~ɕ iniʔ qa*aq la ɣa jani ku tana as~ɕinaħaʔ tamalxi la ka ukas~ɕ ku linamuʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: maha ku nanavakis ini' qavaq la ga yani ku tana asinaha' tamalxi la ka ukas ku linamu' ga.
S.PHON: maħa ku nana*akis~ɕ iniʔ qa*aq la ɣa jani ku tana as~ɕinaħaʔ tamalxi la ka ukas~ɕ ku linamuʔ ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 老人家這麼說,如果不會(配色),就是他們只好隨便(配),沒有挑好色.

S.TRANSL: 老人家這麼說,如果不會 ,就是他們只好隨便 ,沒有挑好色.
they could only pick some at random.

S.FORM: yow ukas a ukas a.
S.PHON: jow ukas~ɕ a ukas~ɕ a.
S.FORM: yow ukas a ukas a.
S.PHON: jow ukas~ɕ a ukas~ɕ a.
S.TRANSL: 喲,沒有,沒有.
Well, no, no.

S.FORM: a imi' nku asi nku yani hiya'.
S.PHON: a imiʔ nku as~ɕi nku jani ħijaʔ.
S.FORM: a imi' nku asi nku yani hiya'.
S.PHON: a imiʔ nku as~ɕi nku jani ħijaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 它意思就像那個.
Its meaning is like that.

S.FORM: na naqu ga i gaga' na itaal ga ukas.
S.PHON: na naqu ɣa i ɣaɣaʔ na itaal ɣa ukas~ɕ.
S.FORM: na naqu ga i gaga' na itaal ga ukas.
S.PHON: na naqu ɣa i ɣaɣaʔ na itaal ɣa ukas~ɕ.
S.TRANSL: 本族人沒有這個習俗.
Our tribemen do not have such a convention.

S.FORM: ukas ku maha asiki kiya ku lngawniya' ga.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ ku maħa as~ɕiki kija ku lŋawnijaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: ukas ku maha asiki kiya ku lngawniya' ga.
S.PHON: ukas~ɕ ku maħa as~ɕiki kija ku lŋawnijaʔ ɣa.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有人說它(紋路的編織)必須有方向.

S.TRANSL: 沒有人說它 必須有方向.
No one says that there must be certain ways of pattern weaving.

S.FORM: asiki kiya ku i mahananu' ku linmu mayungniya' ga.
S.PHON: as~ɕiki kija ku i maħananuʔ ku linmu majuŋnijaʔ ɣa.
S.FORM: asiki kiya ku i mahananu' ku linmu mayungniya' ga.
S.PHON: as~ɕiki kija ku i maħananuʔ ku linmu majuŋnijaʔ ɣa.
S.TRANSL: 有時候我配好的顏色要有某些紋路.
Sometimes there must be some pattern for my chosen colors.

S.FORM: asiki kiya ku lngawniya' ma ukas ku mwani.
S.PHON: as~ɕiki kija ku lŋawnijaʔ ma ukas~ɕ ku mwani.
S.FORM: asiki kiya ku lngawniya' ma ukas ku mwani.
S.PHON: as~ɕiki kija ku lŋawnijaʔ ma ukas~ɕ ku mwani.
S.TRANSL: 有人說一定照著某個模樣,可是沒有這樣子.

TRANSL.notes: Some say that (we) have to follow a pattern in weaving, but it is not so.

S.TRANSL: Some say that have to follow a pattern in weaving, but it is not so.

S.FORM: asiki.
S.PHON: as~ɕiki.
S.FORM: asiki.
S.PHON: as~ɕiki.
